translation_notes: Greek metanoeite/metanoia should be rendered contextually as turn/realign/change consciousness rather than flattened to guilt-heavy repent.
Basileia ton ouranon should be handled as reign/realm of the heavens, not merely a distant place called heaven.
Gehenna should remain Gehenna with notes, not flattened into generic hell.
Aiōn language should be rendered age/era where context supports it, not world by default.
Dikaiosyne should be translated by context as justice/righteousness/right-relatedness rather than only moral legal status.
Jesus' teaching layer should preserve Jewish apocalyptic, wisdom, and Torah context while keeping mystical companion interpretation separate.
next_actions: Begin Matthew 1-7: genealogy, birth narrative, John, temptation, beginning of teaching, Sermon on the Mount.
Add glossary entries for metanoia, basileia, ouranoi, Gehenna, aiōn, dikaiosyne, makarioi, pneuma, logos, and euangelion.
